en.summary: Re-enactors gather at a history festival, bringing the past to life with costumes and demonstrations.
en.why_irrelevant: this local heritage event is far removed from global political and tech news.

brief: Escalating US-Iran strikes, West Bank killings, and wildfires in Europe dominate today's news, while papers explore usability and ethics in AI-assisted tools.
news_summary: US and Iran trade new strikes amid Middle East crisis; four Palestinians and two Israelis killed in West Bank; wildfires rage across Spain and France causing mass evacuations.
papers_summary: Papers focus on usability of conversational AI advisors, accessible AR for deaf students, and ethical concerns of generative AI in dementia care.

en.brief: Escalating US-Iran strikes, West Bank killings, and wildfires in Europe dominate today's news, while papers explore usability and ethics in AI-assisted tools.
en.news_summary: US and Iran trade new strikes amid Middle East crisis; four Palestinians and two Israelis killed in West Bank; wildfires rage across Spain and France causing mass evacuations.
en.papers_summary: Papers focus on usability of conversational AI advisors, accessible AR for deaf students, and ethical concerns of generative AI in dementia care.

zh.brief: 今日重点：美国对60个贸易伙伴加征新关税，指控其未能禁止强迫劳动产品，影响中国、台湾等经济体；美中AI科技战升级，白宫指控中国公司窃取技术；香港出版环境持续收紧。同时，全球多地发生冲突与灾害，包括西岸枪击、红海航运威胁、西班牙法国野火及麻疹病例激增。
zh.news_summary: 美国以强迫劳动为由对60个贸易伙伴加征10%-12.5%关税，涵盖中国、台湾、欧盟等；白宫指控中国AI公司月之暗面窃取Anthropic技术。此外，香港出版环境变化引发关注，西岸枪击致4死，红海航运面临威胁，西班牙法国野火肆虐，美国麻疹病例创纪录。
zh.papers_summary: 今日无中文论文摘要。英文论文侧重AI可用性研究，包括对话式产品顾问、智能眼镜创意写作辅助及增强现实无障碍系统等。

todays_image.caption: The star-shaped aster flowers echo the Star of David, a symbol of the Israeli victims, yet their roots grow in the same soil as the Palestinian lives lost.
todays_image.title: Chaetopappa asteroides (Nutt.) DC.
